text:
The Mafia Hacker is a hacker who was tasked with finding information on members of the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 102 

Appearance

The Mafia Hacker has delicate features and medium-length, messy hair that falls over his ears and covers his right eye. He has a slim build.

Personality

The Mafia Hacker projects an air of confidence. He likes to speak in ambiguous terms before going into full explanations. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Hired by the Mafia, the hacker is asked to find any information on the "dead" Troupe members following their attack on the Cemetery Building. After six hours of research, he tells two Mafia members that the Troupe members don't exist. He explains that he found nothing about them after checking 60 years' worth of medical, military, and academic records, as well as DNA and family registers (even those of the deceased). The lack of information about them leads him to conclude that they hail from Meteor City. He irks his two handlers by stating that the Spiders simply do not exist before confirming his findings. After recounting the incident involving a vagrant, he discourages the mobsters from seeking retaliation, adding that the Ten Dons would agree with his assessment. 

Abilities & Powers

The hacker boasted of being able to find the illegitimate children of a president in three hours. In six, he managed to access the highly secure International Human Databank and look over 60 years' worth of records. He also has some deduction skills and general knowledge, quickly determining that the lack of information on the Spiders pointed to them hailing from Meteor City. 

Manga Appearances

Quotes

(About the Phantom Troupe) "They don't exist--from society's point of view." 
"Meteor City. Anything can be abandoned there. Trash... weapons... dead bodies... and babies. Dump anything there. Anything in the world. Its residents will accept it all." 
(About Meteor City's residents) "We don't know what they teach their kids, but it sure ain't math. Their bonds are thinner than water, and yet thicker than blood." 

Trivia

The character's name was never given.
The character does not appear in either anime adaptation.

Intertextuality and References

The art design for the character is sampled from or based on pictures of a young man from a Japanese fashion magazine, Mr. High Fashion (ＭＲミスター・ハイファッション) December 1998's issue No.87.
